description: Deploy 3-container translation pipeline to RunPod Serverless using GitHub integration and MCP tools

userStories.title: Connect GitHub to RunPod
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to connect my private GitHub repo to RunPod so that RunPod can build Docker images from my Dockerfiles.
acceptanceCriteria: RunPod GitHub integration enabled in dashboard
Verify RunPod can access repo (test build trigger)
userStories.notes: Completed manually via RunPod dashboard. GitHub OAuth connected to private yt-translate repo.

userStories.title: Create Audio Worker Template
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to create a RunPod serverless template for the audio worker that builds from runpod/audio/Dockerfile.
acceptanceCriteria: Image builds from GitHub repo Dockerfile
Environment variables configured: HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
userStories.notes: Template created with ID k0iwwtx14x. Image: ghcr.io/fsikora/yt-translate/audio:latest. Volume at /workspace (RunPod default). Env vars configured.

userStories.title: Create Chatterbox Worker Template
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to create a RunPod serverless template for the Chatterbox TTS worker.
userStories.notes: Template created with ID 0m5zlkzse8. Image: ghcr.io/fsikora/yt-translate/chatterbox:latest. Volume at /workspace (RunPod default). Env vars configured.

userStories.title: Configure vLLM Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to create a vLLM endpoint using RunPod's pre-built vLLM Worker template for Qwen3-32B translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Use RunPod's official vLLM Worker template
Document endpoint URL and API format
userStories.notes: Endpoint created: mo5vt1mlci0mtw (yt-vllm). Template: gxd9dfcy8l. GPU: A100 80GB. OpenAI API at /openai/v1. Documented in runpod/vllm/README.md.

userStories.title: Create Audio Serverless Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to create a serverless endpoint for the audio worker with auto-scaling.
userStories.notes: Endpoint created: 6ml08xitszksx7. Name: yt-audio -fb. GPU: RTX 4090. Workers: 0-3 (reduced from 4 to fit chatterbox). Flashboot enabled.

userStories.title: Create Chatterbox Serverless Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to create a serverless endpoint for Chatterbox TTS.
userStories.notes: Endpoint created: fng8yb7yom8qdo. Name: yt-chatterbox -fb. GPU: RTX 4090. Workers: 0-1 (quota limited). Reduced yt-audio max from 4 to 3 to fit quota.

userStories.title: Test Audio Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the audio endpoint processes a test video correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit test job with YouTube video URL
Response includes: language, segments, vocals_path, background_path
Segments have speaker IDs from diarization
userStories.notes: BLOCKED: 1) Docker image ghcr.io/fsikora/yt-translate/audio:latest must be built and pushed to GHCR first. 2) RUNPOD_API_KEY not available in environment - needed to submit test jobs via API. Endpoint exists: 6ml08xitszksx7. Action required: Build/push Docker image, provide API key.

userStories.title: Test vLLM Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the vLLM endpoint translates text segments correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit test translation request (5 segments, EN→ES)
Response returns translated text for all segments
API follows OpenAI chat completion format

userStories.title: Test Chatterbox Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the Chatterbox endpoint generates speech correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit test job with text + voice sample URL
Audio is intelligible and matches voice sample
Processing time < 60 seconds for 30 seconds of speech

userStories.title: Document Endpoint Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to document all endpoint IDs and configuration for Railway integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .env.example with all RunPod endpoint IDs
List any issues encountered and workarounds
